description_long: This is a pair of low-top canvas sneakers in a deep navy blue color, featuring white rubber toe caps and midsoles. The shoes have prominent white stitching along the seams and around the eyelets, giving them a classic, casual look. The laces are white and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through metal eyelets. The heel area displays a visible 'ALL STAR' label, and the back of the sole has a branded patch. The shoes appear clean and unworn, with no visible scuffs or dirt. The overall design is iconic and reminiscent of Converse Chuck Taylor All Star sneakers, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of navy blue canvas sneakers with white rubber toe caps, white laces, and visible 'ALL STAR' branding on the heel. The shoes are clean, unworn, and feature classic white stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded white rubber toe caps, white laces, and the tongue with 'ALL STAR' branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the navy blue canvas, white stitching, and the low-top profile of both shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel area with 'CONVERSE ALL STAR' branding and the back seam stitching.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the navy blue canvas, white stitching, and the low-top silhouette of both shoes.
attribute_logo: Rectangular 'ALL STAR' label on the tongue and heel, black text on white background.
